name: Elastron S.A. - Steel Service Centers
summary: Elastron S.A. - Steel Service Centers imports, processes, produces, and resells steel products and insulated composite panels worldwide. It offers hot-and cold-rolled, and galvanized steel plates, sheets, strips, and coils; long products, such as beams, joints, channels, flats, equal and unequal angles, rounds, squares, T-sections, and bulb flats; circular, square, and rectangular hollow sections; and structural tubes. The company also provides panels-cladding systems; composite SYMDECK decks; cladding single skin products; purlin for steel buildings; drywall metal profiles; hydroponic metal gutters; and core accessories consisting of translucent panels, flashings, and fastening and sealing materials, as well as handles installation services. Further, it produces and trades in electric energy from photovoltaic stations; and agricultural products from glasshouse cultivations. The company's steel products are used in the industry, construction, shipbuilding, agricultural, and energy sectors. The company was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Aspropyrgos, Greece.
